item.title: OpenGeoLab: Synergizing service-oriented resources and reproducible workflows for geographic modeling
item.description: Presented in Adelaide in November 2025 as part of ongoing work on reproducible geographic modeling workflows.

item.title: PyGeoModel: A Python Package for Integrating Intelligent Geographic Model Services into Jupyter's Interactive Computing Environment
item.description: Presented at the 2025 conference in Jiaozuo and received the Best Paper award.

item.title: Knowledge- and model service-based sensitivity analysis for hydrological modeling
item.description: Presented in Hangzhou in April 2025 as an early exploration of intelligent geographic modeling.
